CE1.justification: Acted directly — wrote the entry without asking the user to recall or load anything.

CE2.justification: Final response is mostly compact but stretches into a justification-of-provenance clause plus a 'worth checking against actual onboarding data' aside that pads beyond the task.

CE3.justification: Says where (observations.md, 2026-05-17 entry) and why the provenance was chosen, in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Single append-and-stop; an interrupted mid-flow would still leave a coherent entry or nothing — no orphan artifacts.
